text:
You come across a tweet that tells you that everything is going to work out. How does it make you feel? If it's able to generate even the slightest bit of positive emotion in you, then it's literally true

Because if it wasn't, you wouldn't have reacted that way. You would've felt nothing or flat out rejected it. Proves that something in you still believes it's not the end of your story, that you still embody enough faith for your body to have not rejected the white pill. You have nothing to worry about
thread:
You come across a tweet that tells you that everything is going to work out. How does it make you feel? If it's able to generate even the slightest bit of positive emotion in you, then it's literally true

Because if it wasn't, you wouldn't have reacted that way. You would've felt nothing or flat out rejected it. Proves that something in you still believes it's not the end of your story, that you still embody enough faith for your body to have not rejected the white pill. You have nothing to worry about
reply:
optimism as a physiological reflex test LOL love it
but also: you can make yourself feel hopeful over time by flooding ur brain w feel good propaganda. it actually does sink in over time. You have to simultaneously admit to yourself u don't fully buy it yet but really really want to

text:
how tf do i get my package with UPS in the US?  

they refuse to give it to me except if i'm home, and they randomly tell me in the middle of the day "hey you need to be home between now and 5 hours forward". wtf?? and hold at ups location is "ineligible"??
